\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3713 introduces Messages Flat Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. \paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ w = \frac{1}{2\pi}\oint_C \nabla \arg\Psi \cdot d\ell \in \mathbb Z. \]
